title: 圓滾貓的情侶日常
description: 圓滾滾灰貓的戀愛日常！黏人、撒嬌、鬧彆扭...16種情侶必備貼圖
style_prefix: 1cat, solo, simple background, white background, full body, no humans, animal focus, feral cat, actual cat, ink painting style, brush strokes, cute, sticker, round chubby body, blush stickers, big head small body, large white face, white cheeks, cat face, whiskers, cat paws, grey cat, centered composition, correct anatomy, no text, grey cat
negative_prompt: lowres, bad anatomy, text, error, worst quality, low quality, jpeg artifacts, signature, watermark, blurry, multiple cats, realistic, human, humanoid, catgirl, anime girl, person, clothing, extra limbs, japanese text, kanji, hiragana, katakana

both arms stretched wide open reaching forward, enormous watery puppy eyes, mouth open in a whimper, desperate adorable begging pose, clean composition

teary glistening eyes, hugging a pillow tightly, lower lip trembling, longing sad expression, missing someone
sitting upright with arms crossed, bored impatient expression, eyes half-closed, foot tapping, waiting and sulking, no speech bubble, no text bubble
both paws pressed together in pleading prayer, wide innocent eyes, small hopeful smile, begging expression
